View Our Work

Building the Future with Modular Innovation

Improving and perfecting modular building technologies by fostering long-lasting partnerships among developers, architects, engineers, contractors, and manufacturers worldwide.

View Our Work Our Capabilities
Who We Are

Modernizing how the world builds.

Global Modular Partners brings together developers, architects, engineers, and manufacturers to deliver construction projects faster, leaner, and with less environmental impact than traditional methods. Headquartered in the San Francisco Bay Area with operations in Irvine, GMP was founded in 2019 to coordinate an integrated network of trade partners, manufacturers, and specialty contractors — selecting the right team for each project based on location, scope, and compliance requirements.

Trade Partners
What We Offer

Integrated capabilities spanning construction, compliance, and healthcare infrastructure delivery.

01

Modular Construction

Innovative off-site building solutions for commercial, residential, and industrial applications.

Design-Build Capability
Prefabricated Modules
Sustainable Materials
Learn More
02

Project Management

Expert project delivery with DoD/Military compliance and proven methodology.

DoD Compliance
Risk Management
Quality Assurance
Learn More
03

Healthcare Facilities

Modular medical facilities through our partnership with Hospitals Without Borders.

Telemedicine Centers
Modular Clinics
Emergency Response
Learn More
04

Civil Construction

Infrastructure and civil construction projects through Agbayani Construction.

Bridge Systems
Utility Installation
Road & Highway
Learn More
Global Reach

Operating nationwide, delivering reliable solutions across global markets with local expertise

10+ Trade Partners Manufacturers, engineers & contractors
2 Offices Oakland headquarters & Irvine operations
50% Time Savings Faster than traditional construction
28 Day ADU Accelerated dwelling unit delivery
Credentials

Licensed, certified, and compliant across every jurisdiction we operate in.

State Contractor Licenses

Licensed general contractor in California and multiple additional states, meeting all bonding and insurance requirements for public and private work.

Federal Compliance

Registered and compliant for federal contracting with DoD and government agencies, including required security clearances and documentation standards.

Industry Certifications

ISO-certified processes, modular building institute membership, and specialized trade certifications across our partner network.

International Standards

Manufacturing partnerships meeting European and international building standards through RI Group USA and global supply chain partners.

View All Certifications
